review_body_text: I lerned how to communicate with difficult customers. The most enjoyable part of job is working with different races of people. I learn many things about theit cultures.
Super employer. Very accommodating to its employees. So many benefits. Flexible. A lot of perks. Can participate in many volunteer works (ie. as part of corporate social responsiblity)

review_title: Productivity and energetic team and workplace
review_body_text: - passionate and energetic team with the leader - learned how to communicate well with customer as well as with colleagues - hardest part at first to accept rejection from client , but after certain period of experience, learned to adapt and response it

review_title: i can learn more about management,humanising and well known
review_body_text: learns lots of knowledge and you will be trained by profesional. The opportunities the group provides are only as good as the desire and commitment to achieve what is possible. You will have to take the initiative and be proactive to learn and grow. You must show that hunger, a desire for success, and be committed to achieving your goals, in tandem with achieving Maybank’s.
One of the popular fast food restaurants in the world..free lunch..happy to serving the people eating the foods..halal's job....teamwork..simple job..

review_title: Top bank in Malaysia with good work life balance
review_body_text: Within 4 years working in Maybank i realized that Maybank have a very good organizational culture. TIGER aspiration in Maybank are Teamwork,Integrity,Growth,Excellence and Efficiency and Relationship Building To be the top bank in Malaysia,Maybank is very committed in investing in the human spirit.
It was fun workplace with great colleagues, but the job is quite stress and challenging. However, the company gave good compensation and benefits to its employees.
Jobs are well brief and everything for and easy daily use like surau, kitchen are available in the building, office worker are friendly jobs culture are very satisfied

review_title: Fun work place & the friendly management
review_body_text: I learned many things from the small to the complex one. Love the workplace culture very much besides the managements are very friendly. The hardest one when you need to rectify others early mistake when you are the last person who need to face it. But for me, its teach you many skills & techniques to handle it. It teach you for not to make mistake first that will burden others one day. Overall, I really miss my last job because i have many friends who are so helping & bosses like my own family.

review_title: Fun evironment working place and team work
review_body_text: I had learned how to work on a team... I have to work on office hours..... The management in maybank is awesome... The only hardest part is I had to end the contract..

there are many ad-hock task. need to process document from customer urgently. receiving more than 100 documents from customer every day. the management of the company is good. the hardest is need to complete the document urgently. most enjoyable experience is can learn many things at that department.

i am very glad to be a part of Maybank Islamic Berhad as a whole. I learnt more that I thought I would here. being attached under Policy Analytics, have teach me product cycle in end to end basis and on the shariah based contract.
Assist customer via calls regarding their banking issues. Provide information regarding online bankings and raise report for issues on banking.

review_title: Place where you can learn a lot of thing
review_body_text: Place where you can develop yourself more confident by attend different kind of people. Giving you an experience how to manage customer in a better way.
Good Benefit, living with core values, flexible working with this company. Leading Bank. Good bonus and annual increment. mixed culture and good customer service.

review_title: Efficiently work and have fun event
review_body_text: I have learned how to handling many customers in a time and get to increased my level of patiently. Have a good management and helpful co-workers. Hardest part of the job is when need to faced the cursed from the customers. The most enjoyable part of the job is when i get more acknowledge in banking field.

review_title: Productive -Maybank is one of the leading bank in Malaysia
review_body_text: Have been working with Maybank, Malaysia for the past 24 years. I have exposed very well in the customer service function since banking is a customer oriented organisation. Personality -Able to work under pressure -Able to work well with people at all level -Willing to accept new ideas and changes. The reason for changes is like to stay and work in Singapore.

Joined in year 1985. Designation : Customer Relations Personnel Grade : Clerk Main Responsibilities Banking Hall After Banking Hours, worked in Credit Department Initial Training : Grooming Customer Relations Interpersonal Skills Basic Banking Facilities
Good organisation and healthy environment work place. Place to develop skill and learning some things new. Build career in maybank was a good decision.
location: Maybank group customers care bukit jelutong
cons_text: Shot break in the morning and afternoon

review_body_text: A typical day at work was always filled with good teamwork members and effort put in by all. I was also supported by an understanding boss. Good relationship between leader and team members will ensure high motivation and strive at work place. It was a another set of family for me in Maybank.
